abilities.name: Disguised
abilities.text: This model may not be the target of actions generated by the Charge action.

abilities.name: Regeneration
abilities.text: When this model activates, it heals 1.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the Ψ abilities of other models.

actions.name: Whispering Blades
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, this model may move 2".

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Cruelty
triggers.text: Once per turn. Declare this action again.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (fortitude). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Blend In
actions.effects: Place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Blade in the Dark
triggers.text: Once per activation. This model may declare a (melee) action, which receives a (+).

triggers.name: Overlooked
triggers.text: This model gains an Aura (Concealment) token.
